places.name: Electric Ladyland: The Museum of Fluorescent Art
places.description: The world's only museum devoted to the wonders of fluorescence.

places.name: Nieuwe Spiegelstraat
places.description: An Amsterdam street lined with antique shops each one dedicated to a different obscure collection.

places.name: De Poezenboot (The Cat Boat)
places.description: A floating cat sanctuary on an Amsterdam canal.

places.name: Hortus Botanicus Amsterdam
places.description: Established in 1638 to battle the Black Death, this botanical garden is a treasure trove of rare flora.

places.name: The Torture Museum
places.description: Museum preserving torture methods from the past.

places.name: KattenKabinet
places.description: Cat art as far as the eye can see.

places.name: Cuypers Library
places.description: This gorgeous reading room houses the oldest and largest art history library in the Netherlands.

places.name: In't Aepjen
places.description: This historic Amsterdam bar used to accept sailor's monkeys as payment.

places.name: Café Papeneiland
places.description: Famed for its pie, this eatery has a hidden tunnel that allowed Catholics to secretly walk to church during the Reformation.

places.name: Amsterdam Cheese Museum
places.description: This cheese shop also houses a museum devoted to Dutch dairy.
